ground_truth.title: Newsroom
ground_truth.main_content:
Welcome to the Newsroom
The American Dental Hygienists’ Association (ADHA®) is the largest and oldest organization representing the professional interests of the more than 220,000 dental hygienists in the United States. Dental hygienists are preventive oral health professionals, licensed in dental hygiene, who provide educational, clinical and therapeutic services that support total health through the promotion of optimal oral health.
Read news and announcements involving membership, leadership, education, sponsorship, events, the dental hygiene profession and the ADHA Foundation. For media inquiries or questions on news and announcements involving the ADHA or the ADHA Foundation, please contact [email protected].

Dental hygienists are preventive oral health professionals, licensed in dental hygiene, who provide educational, clinical and therapeutic services that support total health through the promotion of optimal oral health.
